MiuMiu 2025SS blue and white striped sweatshirt is made of 50-count 400g double-strand combed cotton yarn, ensuring a lightweight, smooth, and durable fabric that is resistant to deformation. The exclusive striped weaving technique involves precise adjustment of warp and weft yarn density to create a three-dimensional texture, requiring professional equipment and strict quality control. The striped yarn is pre-dyed in batches and then color-matched to ensure color saturation and distinct boundaries between stripes. The neckline is hand-stitched using a special curved needle to connect the ribbed collar and body seamlessly without visible stitches. The stitching tension is carefully controlled to maintain a natural curve and elasticity in the neckline, avoiding stiffness from machine sewing. The fabric is meticulously cut to align the stripes perfectly, with a margin of error within 1mm to ensure seamless continuity. Due to the precise cutting requirements, the fabric utilization rate is only 60%-70%, significantly higher than the typical 90% for garment cutting, leading to increased costs. The intricate embroidery is done using a Japanese Tajima digital embroidery machine, achieving a speed of 800 stitches per minute with a thread density of 0.3mm. The embroidery creates a relief effect through padding and anti-wrinkle treatment to maintain shape after washing. The production process involves 27 steps from yarn customization to finished garment, with the cutting process alone taking three times longer than usual due to the striped pattern. The hand-sewn section has a daily output of less than 10 pieces, showcasing the luxury brand's meticulous attention to detail. Sizes available: 36-38-40-42.
